name: Acme Employee Onboarding Chatbot
idea: create a chatbot for employee to learn company
guideline: Develop a lightweight, high-impact MVP leveraging our standard Next.js stack, focusing on immediate value for new hires while adhering to the 8-week delivery constraint through modular component design.

timeline.deliverable: Functional requirements document and data source inventory
MVP chatbot prototype with core Q&A functionality
Internal beta feedback report and UI adjustments
